BridgeArn.description: The ARN of the bridge that you added outputs to.

Outputs.description: The outputs that you added to this bridge.

BridgeArn.description: The ARN of the bridge that you added sources to.

Sources.description: The sources that you added to this bridge.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that you added media streams to.

MediaStreams.description: The media streams that you added to the flow.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that these outputs were added to.

Outputs.description: The details of the newly added outputs.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that these sources were added to.

Sources.description: The details of the newly added sources.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that these VPC interfaces were added to.

VpcInterfaces.description: The details of the newly added VPC interfaces.

RouterInputs.description: An array of router inputs that were successfully retrieved.

Errors.description: An array of errors that occurred when retrieving the requested router inputs.

RouterNetworkInterfaces.description: An array of router network interfaces that were successfully retrieved.

Errors.description: An array of errors that occurred when retrieving the requested router network interfaces.

RouterOutputs.description: An array of router outputs that were successfully retrieved.

Errors.description: An array of errors that occurred when retrieving the requested router outputs.

Bridge.description: The name of the bridge that was created.

BridgeArn.description: The ARN of the deleted bridge.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that was deleted.

Status.description: The status of the flow when the DeleteFlow process begins.

GatewayArn.description: The ARN of the gateway that was deleted.

Arn.description: The ARN of the deleted router input.

Name.description: The name of the deleted router input.

State.description: The current state of the deleted router input, indicating where it is in the deletion process.

Arn.description: The ARN of the deleted router network interface.

Name.description: The name of the deleted router network interface.

State.description: The current state of the deleted router network interface, indicating where it is in the deletion process.

Arn.description: The ARN of the deleted router output.

Name.description: The name of the deleted router output.

State.description: The current state of the deleted router output, indicating where it is in the deletion process.

Entitlements.description: The entitlements that were just granted.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that these entitlements were granted to.

Reservation.description: The details of the reservation that you just created when you purchased the offering.

BridgeArn.description: The ARN of the bridge from which the output was removed.

OutputName.description: The name of the bridge output that was removed.

BridgeArn.description: The ARN of the bridge from which the source was removed.

SourceName.description: The name of the bridge source that was removed.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that was updated.

MediaStreamName.description: The name of the media stream that was removed.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that the output was removed from.

OutputArn.description: The ARN of the output that was removed.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that the source was removed from.

SourceArn.description: The ARN of the source that was removed.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that is associated with the VPC interface you removed.

NonDeletedNetworkInterfaceIds.description: IDs of network interfaces associated with the removed VPC interface that MediaConnect was unable to remove.

VpcInterfaceName.description: The name of the VPC interface that was removed.

Arn.description: The ARN of the router input that was restarted.

Name.description: The name of the router input that was restarted.

State.description: The current state of the router input after the restart operation.

Arn.description: The ARN of the router output that was restarted.

Name.description: The name of the router output that was restarted.

State.description: The current state of the router output after the restart operation.

EntitlementArn.description: The ARN of the entitlement that was revoked.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that the entitlement was revoked from.
The ARN of the flow that you started.

Status.description: The status of the flow when the StartFlow process begins.

Arn.description: The ARN of the router input that was started.

Name.description: The name of the router input that was started.

State.description: The current state of the router input after being started.

MaintenanceScheduleType.description: The type of maintenance schedule associated with the router input.

MaintenanceSchedule.description: The details of the maintenance schedule for the router input.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the router output that was started.

Name.description: The name of the router output that was started.

State.description: The current state of the router output after being started.

MaintenanceScheduleType.description: The type of maintenance schedule associated with the router output.

MaintenanceSchedule.description: The details of the maintenance schedule for the router output.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that you stopped.

Status.description: The status of the flow when the StopFlow process begins.

Arn.description: The ARN of the router input that was stopped.

Name.description: The name of the router input that was stopped.

State.description: The current state of the router input after being stopped.

Arn.description: The ARN of the router output that was stopped.

Name.description: The name of the router output that was stopped.

State.description: The current state of the router output after being stopped.

RoutedState.description: The state of the association between the router input and output.

RouterOutputArn.description: The ARN of the associated router output.

RouterOutputName.description: The name of the associated router output.

RouterInputArn.description: The ARN of the associated router input.

RouterInputName.description: The name of the associated router input.

BridgeArn.description: The ARN of the bridge that was updated.

Output.description: The bridge output that was updated.

BridgeArn.description: The ARN of the updated bridge source.

DesiredState.description: The new state of the bridge.

Entitlement.description: The new configuration of the entitlement that you updated.

FlowArn.description: The ARN of the flow that this entitlement was granted on.
The ARN of the flow that is associated with the media stream that you updated.
The ARN of the flow that is associated with the updated output.

Output.description: The new settings of the output that you updated.

Source.description: The details of the sources that are assigned to the flow.

GatewayInstanceArn.description: The ARN of the instance that was updated.
